name: Healthy Weight Dog Treats
description: Hill's Healthy Weight Dog Treats are tasty, healthy and rewarding treats for adult dogs over 1 year old. Supports healthy weight loss and weight maintenance. Crunchy and delicious with a great taste your dog will love! No artificial preservatives. No synthetic colours. No artificial flavours. A great complementary snack for dogs being fed Hill's Prescription Diet Metabolic, Metabolic + Mobility, j/d , r/d or w/d Dog Food, Hill's Science Plan Perfect Weight or Light Dog Food or Hill's Vet Essentials Multi-Benefit + Weight Dog Food.
